title: WBUHS Exam Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: WBUHS Exam Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: West Bengal University of Health Sciences Result 2026 declared for 2nd Professional BDS and M.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology Part-II (Biochemistry, Microbiology) exams on the official website - wbuhs.ac.in on 06-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the WBUHS result.

content.text: The West Bengal University of Health Sciences has officially released WBUHS Exam Result 2026 for key UG and PG health sciences programmes for the latest academic session. The current declaration covers the Result of 2nd Professional B.D.S. January - February 2026 Examination and the Result of M.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology in Biochemistry Part-II and M.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology in Microbiology Part-II November - December 2025 Examinations. WBUHS Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - wbuhs.ac.in.

Students can visit the examination result portal, select their course and examination, and access their result via the online result page where they need to provide their roll number or other exam credentials. After downloading or viewing the online marks statement, students should carefully verify their personal details, subject-wise marks and overall result status, and promptly contact the university or their college in case of any discrepancy.

WBUHS Exam Results 2026 give an updated view of academic performance for dental and medical laboratory technology students in West Bengal. With the publication of 2nd Professional BDS and M.Sc MLT Part-II results, students can now assess their progress and eligibility for higher studies, registration or further training. All results are hosted in online mode through the official examination result portal to ensure reliable and timely access for candidates and affiliated institutions.

rows: The West Bengal University of Health Sciences (WBUHS)
2nd Professional B.D.S.; M.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology in Biochemistry Part-II; M.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology in Microbiology Part-II
BDS: January - February 2026; M.Sc MLT: November - December 2025
Professional and PG Part-II examination results
Online result portal with course/exam-wise selection

content.text: WBUHS has activated course-wise online result search through its examination results page and the dedicated student result status portal. Using these links, students of 2nd Professional BDS and M.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology Part-II (Biochemistry and Microbiology) can directly reach the result interface and enter their credentials to view their marks. The table below lists the common result access points for the latest WBUHS Exam Result 2026.

links.label: Result of 2nd Professional B.D.S. January - February 2026 Examination
Result of M.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology in Biochemistry Part-II November - December 2025 Examination
Result of M.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology in Microbiology Part-II November - December 2025 Examination

sections.heading: Steps to Check WBUHS Exam Result 2026

content.text: Students can check WBUHS Exam Result 2026 for BDS and M.Sc MLT courses through the university’s online result portals. The process requires correct selection of course/exam and entry of valid exam credentials.
Follow these steps to check WBUHS Exam Result 2026:

items: Visit the official website of WBUHS at wbuhs.ac.in.
Go to the “Examination Results” section or directly open https://wbuhs.ac.in/examination-results/.

On the results page, locate the links/notifications for: Result of 2nd Professional B.D.S. January - February 2026 Examination Result of M.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology in Biochemistry Part-II November - December 2025 Examination Result of M.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology in Microbiology Part-II November - December 2025 Examination
Result of 2nd Professional B.D.S. January - February 2026 Examination
Result of M.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology in Biochemistry Part-II November - December 2025 Examination
Result of M.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology in Microbiology Part-II November - December 2025 Examination
Click on the relevant result link to be redirected to the student result status portal at https://charaka.wbuhs.ac.in/StudentResultStatusPublish/index.
On the result portal, choose the appropriate course and examination from the dropdown or list, if required.
Enter your examination credentials such as University Roll Number/Registration Number and any other details asked.
Click on the “View” or “Submit” button to display your WBUHS Exam Result 2026 on the screen.
Check subject-wise marks, total marks, result status (Pass/Fail/Compartment etc.) and download or print the online marks statement for future reference.
Carefully verify your name, roll number, course, year/part and marks; if any discrepancy is found, contact your college or the WBUHS examination branch immediately with supporting documents.

structured_links.label: Result of 2nd Professional B.D.S. January - February 2026 Examination
Result of M.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology in Biochemistry Part-II November - December 2025 Examination
Result of M.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology in Microbiology Part-II November - December 2025 Examination
